overall.description: Third-person game footage of an armored character exploring a dark, rainy forest at night with a torch. The character walks through grassy meadows and rocky terrain, approaching a cliff face.

agents.ego_description: armored character walking steadily through grassy meadow holding a torch aloft

entered.detail: tall dark pine trees scattered throughout the meadow
tall green grass covering the forest floor
clusters of orange flowers growing in the grass
fallen tree trunks and branches on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open forest meadow at night, torch illuminating tall grass and scattered orange wildflowers. Tall pine trees stand in the distance while rain falls gently through the partial canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path with large boulders

events.description: character moves from open meadow into denser forest with rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky forest path, passing between large boulders and trees

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders flanking the narrow path
thick bushes and low vegetation lining the trail
very large tree trunk with detailed bark texture

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a denser, more enclosed forest area with large rock boulders flanking the dirt path. The character navigates between obstacles as the canopy thickens overhead, providing shelter from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest at base of cliff wall

events.description: character approaches a large rock cliff face in the dense forest

agents.ego_description: walking toward a looming rock wall, torch illuminating the dark cliff face ahead

entered.detail: tall vertical rock face blocking the path ahead
rocks covered in green moss at the base of the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive cliff wall that blocks the path ahead, the torchlight revealing the textured rock surface. The forest becomes darker and more enclosed, with mossy boulders scattered at the cliff base.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy nocturnal forest that transitions from an open meadow into a confined rocky gorge. It begins with the character walking through a grassy clearing where a torch illuminates scattered orange wildflowers beneath a partial canopy of distant pine trees. As the path narrows, the environment shifts into a denser forest area where large rock boulders flank the dirt trail and the thickening canopy provides shelter from the falling rain. The scene then closes in further as the character navigates between mossy obstacles, finally arriving at the base of a massive, textured cliff wall that blocks the way forward.
